summary: Hardened reservation-expiry-race.integration.test.ts: migrated to createTestServer harness with configOverrides for webhook secret, replaced vacuous toBeDefined() with concrete field assertions on admin alert (type, orderId, message, timestamp, details.expiredReservations), added inventory balance end-state assertions, exact reservation count checks, and deterministic order final state verification for both branches (stock-exhausted → manual review, stock-available → re-reserve + confirm)
